headline: Income Safe-Haven Under $40: Why This Packaging Giant’s 5.8% Yield Is Mispriced
summary: With the S&P 500 grinding sideways and Treasury yields keeping income hunters on edge, dividend-paying stocks trading under $40 are getting a fresh look from retail investors who want defensive cash flow without paying a premium.
